description.ko: 음파에 대한 시각적 탐구로, 소리의 주파수가 복잡한 기하학적 패턴과 활기찬 빛의 파동으로 변하며 오디오의 보이지 않는 에너지를 포착합니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of acoustic waves, where sound frequencies transform into intricate geometric patterns and vibrant light pulses, capturing the invisible energy of audio.

prompt: Cinematic 3D visualization of sound waves, ECHO-0 aesthetic, sonic vibrations manifesting as glowing geometric patterns and liquid metal ripples, frequency spectrum visualized as flowing neon light trails in a dark void, deep blue and electric violet color palette, high fidelity, 8k resolution, abstract digital art, macro lens perspective of vibrating particles.
